description: Set up a playback analysis dashboard in the OpenBCI GUI using the recording file at /home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt. Configure a 2-panel layout featuring the Time Series widget and the Spectrogram widget, with the Spectrogram widget specifically set to display Channel 2. Ensure the session is active and data is scrolling in both widgets.
